p with rightwards arrow on top equals open parentheses table row 2 row cell negative 1 end cell end table close parentheses comma space d a n space q with rightwards arrow on top equals open parentheses table row cell negative 1 end cell row 4 end table close parentheses
J i k a space u with rightwards arrow on top space d i n y a t a k a n space d e n g a n space p with rightwards arrow on top plus q with rightwards arrow on top comma space b e s a r space v e k t o r space u with rightwards arrow on top a d a l a h....
